title: carlina sicula subsp. mareotica
intro: Carlina sicula subsp. mareotica, also known as the Italian carline thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Carlina sicula subsp. mareotica include its ability to ease respiratory problems, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil is also used in herbal medicine, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
